name: First Citizens Bank
description_short: First Citizens Bank is a traditional bank offering checking, savings, lending, and digital banking services across multiple locations including Nashville, TN.
description_long:
First Citizens Bank operates as a full-service retail and commercial bank with a presence across multiple states, including a Nashville location in the Midtown area at 1516 16th Avenue South. The company emphasizes a relationship-driven approach to banking, encapsulated in their "Forever First" philosophy, which prioritizes long-term customer relationships and experienced personal service alongside financial products.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. For consumers, this includes free checking accounts, savings accounts with varying interest rates, personal lending, home equity products, and credit cards. On the business side, First Citizens provides business checking and savings accounts, business lending, business credit cards, and merchant services. All customers have access to First Citizens Digital Banking, which enables online and mobile banking across connected devices for account management, transfers, and payments.

First Citizens distinguishes itself through its emphasis on having experienced bankers available for personalized consultation and its commitment to maintaining consistent branding and service over time. The bank provides multiple account opening channels—online, in-branch, or by phone—and offers transparent information about routing numbers and account details. They maintain established relationships with local business lending and commercial lending specialists.

A practical limitation of this Nashville location is that the drive-up window is entirely closed, with lobby hours limited to Monday-Friday 9 AM-5 PM. The physical location itself appears to currently be closed according to the website header. For customers requiring weekend or extended hours, this branch may not be suitable, though the bank does operate other nearby locations such as Franklin - Royal Oaks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free checking accounts available with no monthly maintenance fees
Digital banking platform accessible across multiple devices for 24/7 account management
Multiple account opening methods: online, in-branch, or phone (888-FC DIRECT)
Transparent routing number information provided (TN routing: 064008970 for electronic payments)
Business banking services including merchant services and commercial lending specialists
Relationship-based service model with experienced bankers available for consultation
Multiple branch locations nearby for in-person banking needs
cons: Drive-up window is completely closed at this location, limiting convenience
Limited hours: Monday-Friday 9 AM-5 PM only; closed weekends and Saturdays
The specific Nashville-Midtown branch location at 1516 16th Avenue South is currently closed
No drive-through banking hours listed as available at this branch
Website indicates customers should use other nearby locations instead of this branch
best_for: Consumers seeking a traditional bank with relationship-based service and free checking accounts
Business owners needing comprehensive banking services including merchant services and commercial lending
Customers who prefer in-person banking with access to experienced loan officers and financial specialists
Users comfortable with weekday-only branch hours and who can leverage digital banking for evening/weekend needs
diagnosis: First Citizens Bank is best for consumers and businesses seeking traditional full-service banking with personal relationships and digital convenience. The main caveat is that the advertised Nashville-Midtown branch location is currently closed, and this specific branch has no drive-through and limited weekday-only hours, making it suitable only for customers with flexible daytime availability or who primarily use digital banking.
services: Savings accounts with variable interest rates
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Direct deposit and ACH payment processing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
